svg.title: Thai Token Optimizer – System Architecture
svg.desc: Premium animated SVG architecture diagram for Thai Token Optimizer. Shows the flow from user input, through risk control, compression, verification, and output operations, with meaningful icons and vivid motion effects.
svg.text: Local-first control, compression, verification, and operations layers

g.text: prompt text • hook payload • file input • benchmark corpus • session log
mode tracker → profile selector → safety classifier → policy defaults
code-aware parser → semantic analyzer → dictionary → dedup → budget optimizer → MTP
constraint locker → preservation checker → safety fallback → reports
CLI text/json/pretty • hook context • dashboard • fleet • CI artifacts
